# DINOForge

> A general-purpose mod platform and agent-driven development scaffold for Diplomacy is Not an Option.

DINOForge is a **mod operating system**, not a single mod. It provides a framework, registries, schemas, and tooling for building any type of mod — from simple balance tweaks to full total conversion packs.

Built on **BepInEx 5.4.x** with direct integration to DINO's **Unity ECS (DOTS)** runtime. Uses **YAML-first declarative pack system** with dependency resolution, conflict detection, and comprehensive schema validation (14+ JSON schemas).

The platform layers from Runtime → SDK → Domain Plugins → Content Packs. Agents contribute through pack definitions (YAML), registry extensions (type-safe), schema additions, and test fixtures — not by patching core engine code.

## Key Concepts

- **Packs**: YAML manifests + content files. Self-describing, versioned, with explicit dependencies and conflict rules.
- **Registries**: Type-safe collections (Units, Buildings, Factions, Weapons, Doctrines, etc.) with layered priority and conflict detection.
- **ECS Bridge**: Maps mod content to DINO's actual Unity components at runtime (30+ component mappings, stat modifiers, entity queries).
- **Wrap, Don't Handroll**: Always prefer existing libraries/tools with thin wrappers. No custom implementations when proven packages exist.
- **Pack Types**: `content`, `balance`, `ruleset`, `total_conversion`, `utility`.

## Getting Started

### Build & Test

```bash
# Build all
dotnet build src/DINOForge.sln

# Run tests
dotnet test src/DINOForge.sln

# Validate packs
dotnet run --project src/Tools/PackCompiler -- validate packs/

# Build a pack
dotnet run --project src/Tools/PackCompiler -- build packs/example-balance
```

### Create a Pack

1. Create a directory: `packs/my-pack/`
2. Add `pack.yaml` manifest:
   ```yaml
   id: my-pack
   name: My Pack
   version: 0.1.0
   author: YourName
   type: balance
   framework_version: ">=0.1.0"
   depends_on: []
   conflicts_with: []
   loads:
     units:
       - units/
     buildings:
       - buildings/
   ```
3. Add YAML content files in referenced directories.
4. Run: `dotnet run --project src/Tools/PackCompiler -- validate packs/my-pack`

## Docs

- [README.md](https://github.com/KooshaPari/Dino/blob/main/README.md): Feature overview, architecture diagrams, quick start
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/KooshaPari/Dino/blob/main/CLAUDE.md): Agent governance, legal move classes, design principles, build/wrap rules
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/KooshaPari/Dino/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Development workflow, PR guidelines, code style
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/KooshaPari/Dino/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Subagent capabilities and delegation patterns
- [docs/ROADMAP.md](https://github.com/KooshaPari/Dino/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md): v0.6.0+ milestone plan (unit spawner, registry discovery, YAML-only mods)
- [Full Docs](https://kooshapari.github.io/Dino): VitePress site with API reference, pack author guides, tutorial scenarios

## SDK

- **SDK/Registries**: Type-safe registries for Units, Buildings, Factions, Weapons, Projectiles, Doctrines, Skills, Waves, Squads
- **SDK/Validation**: Schema validation via NJsonSchema against 14+ JSON schema definitions
- **SDK/ContentLoader**: Pack discovery, dependency resolution, topological load ordering
- **SDK/Assets**: AssetsTools.NET integration for reading/writing Unity Addressables bundles
- **SDK/Models**: Data models (UnitDefinition, BuildingDefinition, FactionArchetype, etc.)
- **SDK/Dependencies**: Semver-aware dependency resolver with cycle detection
- **SDK/HotReload**: FileSystemWatcher-based pack live reload

## Source

- **src/Runtime**: BepInEx bootstrap plugin, ECS bridge (component mappings, stat modifiers, entity queries), debug overlay, hot reload
- **src/Domains/Warfare**: Faction archetypes (Order, Industrial Swarm, Asymmetric), doctrines, unit roles, wave composition, balance calculation
- **src/Domains/Economy** (planned): Trade, resources, balance
- **src/Domains/Scenario** (planned): Scripting, conditions, objectives
- **src/Tools/PackCompiler**: CLI for pack validation, building, asset packaging
- **src/Tools/DumpTools**: Entity/component dump analysis (Spectre.Console)
- **src/Tools/Cli**: dinoforge CLI (status, query, reload, watch, spawn commands)
- **src/Tools/McpServer**: MCP server for Claude Code integration (13 game tools)
- **schemas/**: 14 JSON schema definitions (unit, building, faction, weapon, etc.)
- **packs/**: Example packs — example-balance, warfare-modern, warfare-starwars, warfare-guerrilla

## Agent Rules

**MUST DO**:
- Work through manifests and registries
- Update CHANGELOG.md, README.md when adding features
- Add tests for public APIs (target: 130+ tests passing)
- Run `dotnet test` before completing work
- Use generators/templates for new content
- Validate all packs before commit

**MUST NOT**:
- Handroll what a library already solves — always wrap existing packages
- Patch runtime internals (unless assigned runtime-layer work)
- Invent new registry patterns casually
- Duplicate schemas
- Hardcode content IDs in engine glue
- Skip tests or merge without compatibility checks

**Legal move classes**: create schema, extend registry, add content pack, patch mapping, write validator, add test fixture, add debug view, add migration, add compatibility rule.

## Testing

BDD-first (behavior specs before code), Schema-Driven Development (SDD), TDD (unit tests), property-based tests for balance models, pack validation tests, integration tests vs. mock ECS.

Current: 80+ tests passing (target: 130+).

## Architecture

```
Content Packs (YAML manifests)
     ↓
Domain Layer (Warfare plugin)
     ↓
SDK Layer (Registries, Validation, ContentLoader, Assets, Dependencies)
     ↓
Runtime (BepInEx plugin, ECS Bridge, Debug Overlay)
     ↓
DINO Game (Unity ECS / DOTS)
```

**Priority layers** (higher wins, same priority = conflict):
- Pack content (3000+)
- Domain plugins (2000+)
- Framework defaults (1000+)
- Vanilla DINO (0+)

## Directory Structure

```
src/
  Runtime/          BepInEx plugin + ECS Bridge
  SDK/              Public mod API (registries, schemas, loaders)
  Domains/Warfare/  Warfare domain plugin
  Tools/            CLI tools (PackCompiler, DumpTools)
  Tests/            xUnit + FluentAssertions (net8.0)

packs/              Content packs (example-balance, warfare-*)
schemas/            JSON schema definitions (14 files)
docs/               VitePress documentation
.claude/commands/   Custom CLI commands (build-all, deploy, test, validate, etc.)
```
